### weather\_app\_splash\_screen\_push<!-- {{#callable_declaration:weather_app_splash_screen_push}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/weather/weather_app_splash_screen.h#L21>)

Displays the weather app splash screen.
- **Description**: Use this function to display the splash screen for the weather application. It initializes a window with a specified background color and sets up the necessary handlers for loading and unloading the window. The splash screen will remain visible for the duration specified by the timeout parameter. This function must be called when you want to show the splash screen, and it does not animate the window transition.
- **Inputs**:
    - `timeout_ms`: Specifies the duration in milliseconds for which the splash screen remains visible. Must be a positive integer. The function does not validate this parameter, so ensure it is set correctly to avoid unexpected behavior.
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`weather_app_splash_screen_push`](<weather_app_splash_screen.c.md#weather_app_splash_screen_push>)  (Implementation)
